# Golden file: personal.files pack
format: v1
---
command: rm ~/Desktop/file.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-delete
---
command: shred ~/Desktop/secret.doc
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-delete
---
command: unlink ~/Desktop/temp.log
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-delete
---
command: cp file.txt ~/Desktop/
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-overwrite
---
command: mv draft.pdf ~/Desktop/final.pdf
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-overwrite
---
command: cp -r src/ ~/Desktop/backup/
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-overwrite
---
command: chmod 777 ~/Desktop/script.sh
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-modify
---
command: chown root ~/Desktop/file.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-modify
---
command: truncate -s 0 ~/Desktop/log.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-modify
---
command: sed -i "s/old/new/" ~/Desktop/notes.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-write
---
command: tee ~/Desktop/output.txt
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-write
---
command: sed -i "s/foo/bar/" ~/Desktop/config.ini
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-write
---
command: cat ~/Desktop/notes.txt
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-access
---
command: head -20 ~/Desktop/diary.md
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-access
---
command: wc -l ~/Desktop/readme.txt
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: personal.files
rule: desktop-access
---
